chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt.Petition No.D-150 of 2023. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 19.04.2023 Mr. Sajid Hussain Mahessar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Waris Bhutto, A.A.G =*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*= Statements are filed on behalf of SHO, P.S Dodapur and S.S.P Jacobabad, the copies whereof are provided to learned counsel for the petitioner, who after going through the same stated that he is satisfied with the progress made by the police and would not press the disposal of the instant petition before this Court on merits, provided SHO, P.S Dodapur is directed to provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
